label: General App Feedback
sample_reviews: ['Why Screentouch Speed feature Stopped. Giving daily updates for app means you are not able to control quality of releases. Work on it and then share periodic updates instead of daily updates.', "the interface changes way to often. the interface designers constantly make it worse to navigate. more difficult to see shows that are of interest and constant loads the suggestions with things I'm not interested in. as a company they seem one fiscal quarter away from beginning to show advertisements. I didn't care about Netflix games but I can't remove the many lines of suggestions for them. Netflix is no longer providing for customers at the price point my subscription affords me.", 'this household stuff is bs. I pay for my partner and I to watch from separate houses. stupid app going elsewhere..', "The app on here is fine, but Love Death and Robots on roku doesn't start over after you finish it and it's been like that for years now Update: If the show already provides subtitles you don't have to put yours on top of theirs", 'Best App out there for binge watching video although u have to pay for a membership but trust me when i say its totally worth it', 'Down when needed to watch new episodes of Stranger things. I wish it had a 0 star option', "Was great until they started banning account sharing. I own two homes but my family in one of the homes can't use my account because it is not on the same network as my personal home. Netflix is getting too greedy, I hope everyone cancels their subscription to stick it to them.", "It is the best platform ever. The web series are best. It's a suggestion, please add a payment method using the Google Play. This would be more easier to purchase the Netflix subscription. And there will be increase in the people purchasing the Netflix subscription. Thank you, i am waiting for reply on the particular topic.☺️", 'it works for a few days then I have to uninstall and reinstall definitely not worth the price', 'Search with Galaxy tablet attached keyboard in-app is not working now. Can only use on-screen keyboard. Please rectify', "Don't waste your time to subscribe. Most new release all 90% indonesia movies. nothing much to watch.", "I am writing to express my strong disappointment as a paid subscriber. The movie Dhurandhar: Part 1 was released on Netflix without Kannada audio, even though Tamil and Telugu were included. This feels like regional discrimination against the Karnataka People's So I Decided to uninstall Netflix", "Netflix is not cheap at all, not to mention the sexual content they expose our children to, and the nonsense and disgust. If I mention sexual content, everyone gets sensitive and feels disgusted that it is being shown to children, but when it comes to mentioning gay sexual content, no one speaks up. It's nonsense", 'First problem is they do not have a lot of movies that Amazon has that I would like to watch. Second issue is they show disgusting filth on my computer and it is hard to make this trash stop so I can browse for movies that are enjoyable and not for derranged people', 'They keep removing THE GOOD SHOWS, REMOVE THE BAD SHOWS!']

label: Subscription & Billing
sample_reviews: ['expensive subscription please 1080 yearly plan', 'I already cancel my subscription yet it purchase for another month😤😤😤', "payment failed and they didn't give subscriptions", 'App perfect but payment method sometimes help we those from Africa and sometimes struggle to pay for subscription', 'Bring subscription payments with bharat bill payment system via national payment corporation of india.', 'I already unsubscribed but still took money and automatically subscribed without knowing it', "The price of subscription keeps going up .but the quality of content hasn't", 'he netflix your app is facing some issue regarding payment because I pay for subscription your app is very difficult not bad I just saying so please solve my problem', "Love everything about the app. The only thing I hate is auto renewal of subscription. Imagine if I die in an accident tomorrow. Netflix will still be charging me until I exhaust my balance. Pausing a subscription every month makes no sense. It's best if they introduce some annual or pre-paid plans. A gift card would be good too.", "My husband is about to cancel our subscription. This is becoming a headache. We have it signed in on our tvs. And our cell phones. Us and our 3 children. And it is wanting us to create another account to be able to watch on our cell phones. so apparently I need a temporary watch for my cell phone? or because I have a new cell phone? yes Netflix you've got it wrong🤦\u200d♀️", "they want me to pay £11.99 for a month subscription and I can't watch the credits to see who played what character because it doesn't give me a chance to watch all the credits. waste of money.", "Subscription has now gone to $29 aud a month, it's not worth it. It's just become a greed game for netflix and I'll be cancelling my Subscription. It shocks me how after many years people have been paying what I think was worth it, now they're just greedy and don't care about their customers. I don't see why we should be making people rich when we're already struggling and they couldn't care less about us. It's a shame. See ya Netflix, thanks for the not so much good experience.", 'useless netflix I already paid for my membership but it shows payment pending and asks me to pay again', 'This app shows pending even after the payment is complete and I have not received the membership and there is no option for refund also, this is very frustrating.', "Price increase then added commercials, now they sign you up for charges you don't agree to with little warning."]

label: Video & Streaming Playback
sample_reviews: ['Unable to stream with my family, too expensive for the poor selection it has.', "I only use this to watch wwe and mostly on my phone. it constantly skips and constantly returns to the beginning of the programme. I end up wasting so much time trying to get it to play the right bit. and then i have to finish it on a TV. have complained and as usual. Big corporate business gives no care of the single customer. so as much as I love wwe. to hell with paying for this horrendous product anymore. I'll just watch highlights on YouTube.", "it's an ok app for streaming movies, but most times, I cant watch anything cos whenever I click on a movie. All I get is a dark screen and nothing playing", "I subscribed to these apps properly, but every time I watch, the videos I downloaded keep loading and don't work. What happened to NETFLIX today?", 'Dear Netflix Team, I’ve been facing persistent buffering issues while streaming on Netflix for the past three months, despite having a 300 Mbps Airtel router and being connected to the 5 GHz band. My handset is Motorola G84, and I am located in Gurgaon (122102). Internet connectivity doesn’t seem to be the issue. Kindly address this matter urgently. Thanks,A Concerned User', "won't play anything on my phone for more than 2 seconds, then the video freezes with the auto continuing. tried reinstalling the app, restarting my phone, nothing will make it work.", 'ihave been facing a very frustrating issue with Netflix. Once a week,the playback security level automatically drops from Widevine L1 to L3. As a result, even though I have a subscription that includes HDR and higher-quality streaming, the video only plays (SD). It is very disappointing that, as an end customer, I am expected to troubleshoot this issue myself. I do not understand why Netflix cannot provide a permanent fix for this problem. For a platform of this scale, really disappointing', 'why does it takes to long to load the movies even though i use wifi please fix bugs', "The app CONSTANTLY freezes when casting, randomly restarts itself, disconnects from casting for no reason, and often disconnects on my phone, but continues playing on my tv yet I can't control the pause or stop to turn it off. This is the only streaming app that does this and it's EXTREMELY ANNOYING!!! For the amount of money we pay each month for this service, the app shouldn't be such garbage!", "i wanna play the film but it's just kept on loading, i don't get it, first i thought it's because i haven't update the app, once i do, it just kept on loading, i refresh, i relog, ive checked my interest and it was all fine, but still it doesn't work. ive tried it on my tv, it works, but not on my phone. pls fix this", "for as much as I pay, I should be able to watch it on my phone! yes I did all of the indicated troubleshooting and no it's not my internet! can't even get on their website!!", "pathetic after subscription Netflix isn't working not able to watch a single series or movie It keeps on buffering for 3 days and ruining my subscribtion", "My netflix isn't working nothing is shown downloading isn't working online videos are not working what is wrong.? It's happening from past 3 days.. Can you please fix it.? Still waiting duh.?", "if i want to watch any movie it doesn't even start it buffers the worst experience I'm getting in netflix now a days", 'always auto pauses while watching a movie, charging heavy fees yet unable to watch in peace']

label: Content & Features
sample_reviews: ['Now these days content is scattered on different platforms! You search a movie, its on different streaming services! what the heck! Have to put out my credit card! So Sorry to these streaming services! Better options we know, rather then paying for various platforms', "The mobile app has almost become unusable, for some reason it mixes profile settings in terms of watch history and parental settings. Just bizzare for a company of this size. The quality of new content has decreased drastically over the past couple of years also. it's search functionality is wors than any other app I use. Shame.", 'For such a big company with billions in annual revenues, I would have expected a better app. AI recommendations are usually not very good. I wish I could disable in-app games or whole categories of films and series that do not interest me (e.g. horror). It feels like we are force-fed unwanted content, which does not make for a very positive user experience.', 'Content is tired, cliche, uncreative under AI slop. In the odd rare chance of a great movie, they have encrapified so severely that users will go months paying for an odd co-dependent expectation for another when they can just one time rent on Amazon or Itunes. Netflix is not the future, it is so 2015. If Netflix ceased to exist, half of users quickly find a lazy replacement, the other half, find a revelatory liberation.', 'I hate the last update. Is a copy on others apps max for example. Not easy to search the movies or series.', "it obvious that this app is top notch, just that there aren't enough latest movies. there was a time a movie was uploaded as latest whereas have watched the movie years back.... Please make an amendments to that....PEACE OUT✌️❤️", "Strangely got rid of a huge amount of their content. Probably to make room for the massive rush of Indian movies and WWE content. Sad. Also, it's a widely known fact that Netflix has massive sound issues. They constantly blame the consumer, even though many people with many different set ups and tvs have the same issues.", 'Netflix has decided to remove shows that are still being watched very frequently. yet miraculous is still on Netflix for some reason. and some of these shows are Netflix originals..so where are they going after they get removed..', 'There is need to provide a request button for people to request for movies and series that are not on Netflix.', "I love Netflix but I wonder please enlighten me, why is BON APPETIT YOUR MAJESTY is not on your app anymore? I have search high and low and it was supposed to have new episode this Sunday September 07, 2025 but there's none on your list...please return it", "please Netflix upload all series. why can't find some series", 'Most of the English movies on Imdb is not available on Netflix.']
